dataset_name: MTG-Jamendo subset for demo + NMED-T aligned features

dataset_citation.author: Bogdanov, Dmitry and Won, Minz and Tovstogan, Philip and Porter, Alastair and Serra, Xavier
dataset_citation.title: The MTG-Jamendo Dataset for Automatic Music Tagging
dataset_citation.booktitle: Machine Learning for Music Discovery Workshop, International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2019)

license_notice.audio_license_note: Audio files are licensed under track-specific Creative Commons licenses.
license_notice.non_commercial_restriction: MTG-Jamendo Dataset is available solely for non-commercial research and academic use.

discretization.description: Surprisal and Entropy continuous sequences were pooled over NMED-T 10 tracks and these 3 demo tracks. Feature-wise 128-bin equal-frequency (quantile) binning was applied and values were mapped to integer labels 0-127.

tracks.artist_credit: May by Alexander Blu from Jamendo
Stickybee by Josh Woodward from Jamendo
